description: This file defines the 'AppShell' React component which renders the main layout including header, footer, and navigation for the culinary companion web application. It also includes helper components 'NavLink' and 'UserMenu' for navigation and user account management.

methods.name: NavLink
methods.description: A functional component that wraps Next.js's Link to apply specific styling and render navigation links.

methods.name: UserMenu
methods.description: A functional component that displays login/signup options or user info and logout button based on authentication state.
